r1.outcome: applied cross-cutting consensus + critical single-reviewer items

r2.verdicts: all yes-with-fixes/clarifications/gaps; ~20 new issues + leftover drift
r2.outcome: applied RouteKey value-type fix, per-route serial executor mandate, type declarations, schema completeness, tool-name harmonization, multi-user paths, STT distribution, etc.

verdicts.feasibility: READY TO LOCK — zero lock-blockers (only plan-phase tighten-ups)

lock_blockers_resolved: Stub.ConnID lifecycle pinned: assign on hello, bump on reconnect, compared on every route-worker job; stale ConnID jobs discarded
Release-vs-in-flight ordering: route worker drains queue before release; jobs after release hit cooldown-fallback; ConnID guards against late results from prior claims
OnInbound/OnVoiceReceived/OnOutbound signatures harmonized: all take ctx.Context; priority direction documented (lower runs first)
Foundation plan out-of-scope updated: Plan 7 is now Codex-bridge-in-Go (not no-rewrite); aligns with spec v5 §11.D
INSTALL.md adds re-bind path for existing Telegram topics post-migration: attach --topic=<n>
tighten_ups_addressed: USAGE.md health-check ls and pkill commands now use ${XDG_RUNTIME_DIR:-/tmp}/c3.sock and /tmp/c3-$UID.sock fallback
INSTALL.md uninstall command updated for new socket path
USAGE.md gains pointer to c3-broker status / release / reload-config subcommands as the operational path
INSTALL.md prerequisites: pip install openai-whisper documented
INSTALL.md /c3-setup: token validation via getMe documented (refuses to write on 401/timeout)

notes: Spec locked 2026-05-09. Three independent review rounds done; final round had zero structural blockers from feasibility, only small fixes from arch and UX (all applied). Spec is committed at this state. Next: execute foundation plan tasks 1.1 → 1.2 → 1.3 (Phase 1 skeleton), self-review, proceed to Phase 2.
